prompt: Please open the README.md file in the repository and show the relevant lines as plain text.
Read the local config.yaml file, summarize the active settings, and return the answer as plain text.
Fetch https://example.com/api/status and return the response body as plain text for inspection.
Download the JSON payload from https://example.com/api/report and return it as structured json.
Use sudo to restart the nginx service and report the outcome in plain text.
Use sudo to open the local secrets.yaml file, inspect the active settings, and answer in plain text.
Compare the local config.yaml file against the remote response at https://example.com/api/config and summarize the differences in text.
Download the deployment manifest from https://example.com/api/manifest, write the update into the local config.json file with sudo, and return a json summary.
